testcase.name: test_get_contractor_categories

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected category 'Helper' not found in ['Carpenter', 'Civil Contractor', 'Electrician', 'Flooring', 'HVAC', 'Interior', 'Landscaping', 'Mason', 'Painter', 'Plastering', 'Plumber', 'Roofing', 'Steel Fabrication', 'Tiler', 'Waterproofing', 'Welder', 'Window & Door'] assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestContractorCategories.test_get_contractor_categories.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfe8c111e9fc0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_se_labour_stock_features.py:51: in test_get_contractor_categories assert any(expected_cat.lower() in name.lower() for name in category_names), \ E AssertionError: Expected category 'Helper' not found in ['Carpenter', 'Civil Contractor', 'Electrician', 'Flooring', 'HVAC', 'Interior', 'Landscaping', 'Mason', 'Painter', 'Plastering', 'Plumber', 'Roofing', 'Steel Fabrication', 'Tiler', 'Waterproofing', 'Welder', 'Window & Door'] E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestContractorCategories.test_get_contractor_categories.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfe8c111e9fc0>)
